title: Peruvian-Style Roasted Ribs
description: A delicious and flavorful recipe for Peruvian-style roasted ribs, perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: In a small bowl, mix together the aji amarillo pepper paste, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Place the pork ribs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the Peruvian spice mixture evenly onto both sides of the ribs.
Roast the ribs in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 300°F (150°C) and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the ribs are tender and caramelized.
Remove the ribs from the oven and let them rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
